'''Astrinol Hja''' was a [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomir Witch]] and the leader of the [[Dreaming River Clan]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Along with the rest of her clan, Hja was imprisoned by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. They were later rescued by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], who were sent to arrest [[Dal Konur]].
